name: @harness/trigger-infra
description: ISSUE-037 — the C3 generic connector trigger layer + liveness spine. The once-per-connector inbound handler/parser consuming an ALREADY-VERIFIED event from C0 webhook-auth (ISSUE-017) → normalized event → trigger evaluation (FR-3.TRIG.001); the per-vendor transport/verification-SCHEME identity wiring homing OD-044 (FR-3.TRIG.004; GHL Ed25519 / Slack / Google arms gated on AF-090/084/083/108/109); the no-code event+condition→task config + runtime condition-matching (FR-3.TRIG.002); the per-connector default trigger set with per-deployment enable/disable toggles (FR-3.TRIG.003); and the load-bearing #3 liveness pair — proactive watch/subscription re-arm before expiry with fail-LOUD degraded on lapse (FR-3.TRIG.005) + event-delivery gap detection + watermark reconciliation (FR-3.TRIG.006). Port + in-memory fake reference model; supabase-store.ts is the live pg adapter authored to the tools.config jsonb + event_log/audit DDL — NOT run live. Liveness tested with an INJECTED clock (no real scheduler).
